title: Ansede Configuration
description: Configuration schema for ansede.json (Ansede v2.0+). A security tool that silently ignores malformed configuration is not a security tool.

sinks.description: Custom taint sink definitions. Extends the built-in sink catalogue.

sources.description: Custom taint source definitions. Extends the built-in source catalogue.

custom_sinks.description: Legacy v1 custom sink format. Prefer the 'sinks' array for new configs.

exclude_paths.description: Path segments or subpaths to exclude from scanning. Cannot remove built-in exclusions (node_modules, .venv, etc.).

disable_rules.description: Rule IDs to disable globally (e.g. PY-004, CWE-89).

max_callees_per_node.description: Maximum outgoing call-graph edges per node. Guards against dynamic-dispatch explosion. Default: 50.

max_workers.description: Maximum parallel worker processes for file parsing. Default: min(4, cpu_count).

custom_rules_file.description: Path to a YAML or JSON custom rules file.

extra_sanitizer_files.description: Additional sanitizer catalog JSON files to merge with the built-in library.

baseline_file.description: Path to a baseline.json file produced by `ansede baseline generate`.

output_format.description: Default output format when --format is not specified on the CLI.

fail_on.description: Exit code 1 when findings of this severity or higher are found.

log_level.description: Structured log verbosity for the engine. DEBUG emits per-file parse, finding, and suppression events.

function.description: Fully-qualified function or method name to treat as a sink.

tainted_args.description: 0-indexed argument positions that must not receive tainted data.

safe_args.description: 0-indexed argument positions that are always safe (e.g. parameterized slots).

language.description: Language this sink applies to. Omit to apply to all languages.

function.description: Fully-qualified function or attribute access that introduces taint.
